name: trocar_parametric_measured_20260612

measurement.visible_length_note: User reported 2-3 mm; midpoint 2.5 mm is used for the initial measured model.
measurement.operator_note: Measurements were provided onsite; update if caliper re-measurement changes them.

frame.name: trocar
frame.origin: center of the visible/front aperture plane
frame.x_axis: ellipse major-axis convention in image-based baseline; physically arbitrary for a circular ring
frame.y_axis: x_axis cross z_axis on the aperture plane
frame.z_axis: trocar bore axis pointing from the visible/front aperture into the tube

pose_estimation.preferred_baseline: automatic orange/dark ring ellipse detection + solvePnP
pose_estimation.note: Circular ring has rotational symmetry around the bore axis; in-plane roll is a convention, not a robust observable.

measurement_required: Re-measure outer diameter with caliper if possible.
Re-measure inner diameter with caliper if possible.
Record whether orange visible rim plane is flush with the physical aperture.
